description_long: This piano features a rectangular black body with a flat top and a set of four tapered wooden legs, giving it a modern and minimalist appearance. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, spanning nearly the full width of the instrument, and is positioned at the front edge. A wooden music stand is mounted centrally on the top surface, providing a functional accent and a visual break from the otherwise dark finish. The piano lacks visible pedals and has no ornate detailing, emphasizing clean lines and simplicity. The materials appear to be primarily wood, with a matte black finish on the main body and natural wood tones for the legs and music stand. The overall design suggests a compact upright or digital piano suitable for urban environments such as parks, plazas, or community centers.
description: A modern, rectangular black piano with wooden legs, a full keyboard, and a central wooden music stand. The design is minimalist, with a matte finish and no visible pedals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, four wooden legs, and the central wooden music stand.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the keyboard and the flat black top, with the music stand visible on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the solid black back panel, wooden legs, and the back of the music stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the keyboard's length and the music stand, with the same minimalist design.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard linear keyboard with approximately 24 white keys and 17 black keys in alternating groups, no split or missing keys.
